    People also ask
    What is empty data?
    Empty data, also known as a "zero value," refers to a value that is explicitly entered as a zero or a blank space, rather than being null or missing. Do not confuse the blank space in empty data with a blank space in Null data.

    Difference between Null, Empty and Missing Data - The Data School


    The Data School
    https://www.thedataschool.co.uk › shahbaz-khan › differ...
    The Data School
    https://www.thedataschool.co.uk › shahbaz-khan › differ...
    What is a data image?
    A data image represents how data is organized and represented at different levels within an organization, including at the physical level – how the data might be physically stored – and at the logical level – how the information is presented to applications or computer programs.

    What is a Data Image? | C3 AI Glossary & Definitions


    C3 AI
    https://c3.ai › glossary › features › data-image
    C3 AI
    https://c3.ai › glossary › features › data-image
    What is hiding data in images called?
    Steganography is the practice of concealing information within another message or physical object to avoid detection. Steganography can be used to hide virtually any type of digital content, including text, image, video, or audio content.

    What Is Steganography & How Does It Work? - Kaspersky


    Kaspersky
    https://www.kaspersky.com › resource-center › definitions
    Kaspersky
    https://www.kaspersky.com › resource-center › definitions
    खाली डाटा क्या है?
    खाली डेटा, जिसे "शून्य मान" के रूप में भी जाना जाता है, एक ऐसे मान को संदर्भित करता है जिसे शून्य या रिक्त स्थान के रूप में स्पष्ट रूप से दर्ज किया जाता है, न कि शून्य या गुम होने के रूप में। खाली डेटा में रिक्त स्थान को शून्य डेटा में रिक्त स्थान के साथ भ्रमित न करें।

    शून्य , खाली और गुम डेटा के बीच अंतर - द डेटा स्कूल


    The Data School
    https://www.thedataschool.co.uk › shahbaz-khan › differ...
    The Data School
    https://www.thedataschool.co.uk › shahbaz-khan › differ...

    Empty data, also known as a "zero value," refers to a value that is explicitly entered as a zero or a blank space, rather than being null or missing. Do not confuse the blank space in empty data with a blank space in Null data.

    Difference between Null, Empty and Missing Data - The Data School


    The Data School
    https://www.thedataschool.co.uk › shahbaz-khan › differ...
    The Data School
    https://www.thedataschool.co.uk › shahbaz-khan › differ...
    इमेज में डाटा को क्या कहते हैं?
    जब भी आप डिजिटल कैमरे से कोई फोटो लेते हैं, तो इमेज डेटा के साथ-साथ "पर्दे के पीछे" की कई जानकारियां सेव हो जाती हैं। इसे मेटाडेटा के नाम से जाना जाता है, और इसमें इस्तेमाल किए गए कैमरे, लेंस और शूटिंग सेटिंग्स के विवरण के साथ-साथ फोटोग्राफर, स्थान और अन्य के बारे में वैकल्पिक जानकारी शामिल हो सकती है।

    EXIF और मेटाडेटा को समझना - Canon Europe

    See original
    Hide original
    Every time you take a photo with a digital camera, a range of "behind-the-scenes" information is saved along with the image data. This is known as metadata, and it can include details of the camera, lens and shooting settings used, plus optional information about the photographer, location and more.

    Understanding EXIF and metadata - Canon Europe
